addons.description: Addon ecosystem security floor: install policy, signature requirement, per-addon capability sandbox (#863, P1). Global-only.

allowlist.description: Addon slugs permitted when policy = allowlist

block_risky.description: Refuse to install an addon that has a high-risk (Danger) capability

enforce_capabilities.description: Fail closed when an addon declares restricted [capabilities] but no OS sandbox launcher is available to enforce them

metering.description: Record per-addon / per-tool gateway usage to <data_dir>/addons/usage.json (analytics + billing base)

policy.description: Addon install policy: open (any) | verified_only | allowlist | locked

require_signature.description: Honour a user-override registry only if signed by a trusted org key

sandbox.description: Sandbox spawned addon stdio servers: off | auto (block network) | strict (read-only fs + refuse if no launcher)

archive.description: Settings for the zero-loss compression archive (large tool outputs saved to disk)

ephemeral.description: Replace large results with summary+ref (ctx_expand to retrieve). Env: LEAN_CTX_EPHEMERAL

ephemeral_min_tokens.description: Minimum output tokens before the ephemeral firewall replaces inline body with summary+ref. Env: LEAN_CTX_EPHEMERAL_MIN_TOKENS

max_age_hours.description: Maximum age of archived entries before cleanup

max_disk_mb.description: Maximum total disk usage for the archive

threshold_chars.description: Minimum output size (chars) to trigger archiving

autonomy.description: Controls autonomous background behaviors (preload, dedup, consolidation)

auto_preload.description: Auto-preload related files on first read

cognition_loop_enabled.description: Enable the background cognition loop (periodic knowledge consolidation)

cognition_loop_max_steps.description: Maximum steps per cognition loop iteration (>= 9 enables observation synthesis)

cognition_synthesis_min_cluster.description: Minimum facts per entity before observation synthesis writes a summary (needs cognition_loop_max_steps >= 9)

consolidate_every_calls.description: Consolidate knowledge every N tool calls

dedup_threshold.description: Number of repeated reads before dedup triggers

boundary_policy.description: Cross-project boundary and access control policies

audit_cross_access.description: Log audit events when cross-project access occurs

cross_project_import.description: Allow importing knowledge from other projects

auto_sync.description: Push the Personal Cloud (knowledge, commands, CEP, gotchas, buddy, feedback) silently once per day at session end (Pro; toggle: `lean-ctx cloud autosync on|off`)

contribute_enabled.description: Enable contributing anonymized stats to lean-ctx cloud

budget_tokens.description: Fixed per-session context budget (tool schemas + MCP instructions + auto-loaded rules + wakeup briefing). `doctor overhead` warns past this; `doctor overhead --gate` exits non-zero for CI. 0 disables the warning

cost.description: Model declaration for measured-vs-estimated cost reporting

default_model.description: Fallback pricing model for MCP-only IDEs whose real model lean-ctx cannot observe (Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, ΓÇª). Unset ΓåÆ blended heuristic. Per-IDE overrides live in [cost.models]

custom_aliases.description: Custom command aliases (array of {command, alias} entries). Note: field names are 'command' and 'alias' (not 'name')

embedding.description: Semantic-embedding engine settings (model selection for ctx_semantic_search)

auto_download.description: Download the embedding model in the background on first semantic need (default: allowed). Set false for air-gapped machines; semantic features then stay off until a model is provided manually.

deterministic.description: Pin embedding inference to a single CPU thread with no GPU provider so vectors are bit-identical across machines (default: off, multi-threaded GPU-capable path). Extractive prose ranking is already deterministic via score quantization; enable this only for cross-machine reproducibility, at a throughput cost.

dimensions.description: Declared embedding width for hf: custom models (fallback only ΓÇö the real width is probed from the ONNX graph at load time). Built-in models ignore this key.

model.description: Local ONNX embedding model for ctx_semantic_search. One of: minilm (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384d, default), nomic (768d) ΓÇö or any HuggingFace repo with an ONNX export via hf:org/repo[@revision] (e.g. hf:jinaai/jina-embeddings-v2-base-code for code). Switching models re-indexes once on the next search.

auto_publish.description: Automatically (re)publish your Wrapped recap when you run `lean-ctx gain` (opt-in, off by default; throttled and sends only an aggregate payload)

auto_publish_interval_hours.description: Minimum hours between automatic publishes (throttle; default 24)

display_name.description: Optional display name shown on your published card / leaderboard entry

last_auto_publish.description: Timestamp of the last automatic publish (written by lean-ctx for throttling ΓÇö not meant to be edited)

leaderboard.description: When auto-publishing, also list the card on the public opt-in leaderboard

gateway.description: MCP Tool-Catalog Gateway: aggregate + query-route downstream MCP servers (#210). Global-only.

enabled.description: Enable the MCP Tool-Catalog Gateway (no-op when false)

top_n.description: How many tools `ctx_tools find` returns per query (clamped 1..=50)

args.description: Arguments for the spawned command (stdio transport)

env.description: Extra environment variables for the child process (stdio transport)

headers.description: Extra request headers, e.g. Authorization (http transport)

name.description: Stable server id; becomes the catalog namespace (`name::tool`)

transport.description: Transport: stdio (spawn command) or http (connect to url)

graph.description: Code-graph settings, including traversal (co-access) edges learned from sessions

traversal_edges.description: Learn co-access edges from real sessions (files surfaced together), surface them as decaying `co_access` graph edges, and boost recall by them. Set false for a purely static AST-only graph.

ide_paths.description: Per-IDE allowed paths. Keys are agent names (cursor, codex, opencode, antigravity, etc.), values are arrays of paths to index for that agent

llm.description: Optional LLM enhancement settings (query expansion, contradiction explanation). Deterministic fallback when disabled or unreachable.

api_key.description: API key for OpenRouter or Anthropic backends

enabled.description: Enable optional LLM enhancements (query expansion, contradiction explanation)

model.description: Model name for the selected backend

loop_detection.description: Loop detection settings for preventing repeated identical tool calls

search_group_limit.description: Maximum unique searches within a loop window

tool_total_limits.description: Per-tool total call limits within a session. Keys are tool names, values are max calls

window_secs.description: Time window in seconds for loop detection

lsp.description: LSP server binary overrides. Map language name to custom binary path

memory.embeddings.description: Embeddings memory settings for semantic search

max_facts.description: Maximum number of embedding facts stored

memory.gotcha.description: Gotcha memory settings (project-specific warnings and pitfalls)

default_decay_rate.description: Default decay rate for gotcha importance

retrieval_budget_per_room.description: Maximum gotchas retrieved per room per query

max_facts.description: Maximum number of knowledge facts stored per project

recall_facts_limit.description: Maximum facts returned per recall query

timeline_limit.description: Maximum number of timeline entries returned

archetype_aware_decay.description: Scale Ebbinghaus stability by fact archetype so structural evidence decays slower than inference (default false)

base_stability_days.description: Characteristic memory stability (days) for the Ebbinghaus curve

decay_rate.description: Rate at which knowledge confidence decays over time

forgetting_model.description: Forgetting curve: ebbinghaus (default, exponential + spacing) or linear

low_confidence_threshold.description: Threshold below which facts are considered low-confidence

stale_days.description: Days after which unused facts are considered stale

max_procedures.description: Maximum number of learned procedures stored

max_window_size.description: Maximum window size for pattern analysis

min_repetitions.description: Minimum repetitions before a pattern is stored

min_sequence_len.description: Minimum sequence length for procedure detection

providers.description: External context providers (GitHub, GitLab, Jira, MCP bridges, etc.). Set tokens via env vars (GITHUB_TOKEN, GITLAB_TOKEN). MCP bridges connect external MCP servers as context sources.

auto_index.description: Auto-ingest provider results into BM25/embedding indexes

cache_ttl_secs.description: Default cache TTL for provider results (seconds)

enabled.description: Master switch for the provider subsystem (GitHub, GitLab, etc.)

github.api_url.description: GitHub API base URL (for GitHub Enterprise)

gitlab.api_url.description: GitLab API base URL (for self-hosted instances)

mcp_bridges.<name>.args.description: Arguments for the MCP server command

mcp_bridges.<name>.auth_env.description: Environment variable name containing auth token for MCP server

mcp_bridges.<name>.command.description: Command to spawn a local MCP server (stdio transport)

mcp_bridges.<name>.url.description: HTTP/SSE URL for a remote MCP server

proxy.description: Proxy upstream configuration for API routing

allow_insecure_http_upstream.description: Allow a non-loopback plaintext http:// upstream (trusted local network only, e.g. http://host.docker.internal:2455 in front of codex-lb). Opt-in; default false

anthropic_upstream.description: Custom upstream URL for Anthropic API proxy

cache_aligner.description: Opt-in cache-aligner volatile-field telemetry (#940). When on, the proxy scans each unanchored Anthropic system prompt for volatile, cache-busting fields (ISO dates/datetimes, UUIDs, git SHAs) and reports how many it found on /status cache_safety (volatile_system_requests, volatile_fields_detected) - purely to quantify how much prompt-cache the client leaks. Measurement only: the request body is never mutated, so it is strictly cache-safe. The deterministic scan is the precursor to an opt-in tail-relocate. Default false

cache_breakpoint.description: Opt-in active prompt-cache breakpoint injection for Anthropic (#939). When on and the client set no cache_control of its own, the proxy adds one cache_control: {type:ephemeral} marker to the system field so an otherwise-uncached, stable system prompt bills later turns at the cached rate (the win a raw API client leaves on the table). Anthropic-only: OpenAI/Gemini cache prefixes automatically and ignore the marker, so those paths stay byte-unchanged. Deterministic, never adds a second breakpoint, and skipped below Anthropic's minimum cacheable size. Default false

ccr_inband.description: Opt-in in-band CCR retrieval for a remote proxy with no shared filesystem (#493). When on, a lossy stub advertises a compact <lc_expand:HASH> marker instead of a local tee path; when the model echoes that marker, the proxy splices the verbatim original (from its local tee store) back inline next turn ΓÇö one turn of latency, no MCP/filesystem on the agent host. The splice is a strict no-op on marker-less turns, so it never perturbs the provider cache prefix unless the model asked to expand. Default false

chatgpt_upstream.description: Custom upstream URL for ChatGPT/Codex subscription API proxy

cold_prefix_repack.description: Opt-in big-gap cold-prefix repack (#480): on a session-resume request the proxy may predict (from idle time vs the provider cache TTL) that the client-cached prefix has already expired, then prune that now-cold prefix to re-seed a leaner cache and keep applying the same deterministic compression on later turns so warm follow-ups hit it (sticky; baselines persist across restarts, #499). A wrong guess re-bills cache reads as writes (~12x), so default false

effort.description: Cache-safe cross-provider reasoning-effort control (#834). off (default) = no-op. minimal|low|medium|high pins the model's reasoning depth across providers: lean-ctx translates it to OpenAI reasoning_effort / reasoning.effort, Anthropic output_config.effort, and Gemini thinkingConfig (thinkingLevel on 3.x, thinkingBudget on 2.5 pro/flash), only on models that accept it and only when the client didn't set its own value. The level is a constant, so it never breaks the provider prompt cache (unlike per-turn effort routing). Anthropic is dialed only when the client already requested adaptive thinking

gemini_upstream.description: Custom upstream URL for Gemini API proxy

history_mode.description: History pruning strategy. cache-aware: frozen boundaries that keep provider prompt caches valid (default). rolling: legacy moving window (max raw savings, breaks prompt caching). off: never prune

live_compress.description: Live-compress non-protected tool_result content on the wire (#481). Default true. Set false for a meter-only proxy ΓÇö real billed/cache token metering with zero request rewriting (combine with history_mode = "off" and no role_aggressiveness for a byte-unchanged body)

live_compress_exclude.description: Tool-name patterns (case-insensitive substring) whose tool_result is never live-compressed ΓÇö treated as protected, like a file read (#481). Unset protects Serena's code-reading tools; set an explicit list to narrow it, or [] to disable

meter_openai_usage.description: Inject stream_options.include_usage into streamed OpenAI Chat Completions so the final chunk reports real token usage for the measured spend meter. Default true

openai_upstream.description: Custom upstream URL for OpenAI API proxy

output_holdout.description: Fraction 0.0-1.0 of conversations placed in the output-savings control arm (#895). 0 (default) = no holdout (every conversation is output-shaped). When > 0, a deterministic cohort = blake3(system + first user message) puts ~this fraction in a control arm that skips output-shaping (effort control + verbosity steer) but is still metered, yielding an honest measured output-token reduction (lean-ctx output-savings). The cohort is a pure function of conversation identity, so a conversation keeps one arm across all turns - cache-safe

prose_ranker.description: How the proxy squeezes prose it must shrink (#895). auto (default) and extractive use embedding-based extractive ranking ΓÇö keeping the most central sentences instead of just the prefix ΓÇö when the local embedding engine is available, else fall back to truncation; truncate keeps the original deterministic FIFO squeeze and never loads the engine. Wire rewrites are memoized per content so the engine's coldΓåÆwarm transition never changes an already-emitted frozen-region rewrite (cache-safe, #448/#498)

verbosity_steer.description: Opt-in cache-safe wire verbosity steer (#895). When true, the proxy appends a single constant 'be concise' instruction to the last user turn of each request - output-shaping for raw API clients that do not load lean-ctx rules. The suffix is constant and appended strictly after the last cache_control breakpoint (a new trailing text block, never modifying a cache-anchored block), so the provider prompt-cache prefix stays byte-stable. Under an output_holdout the control arm skips it so its effect is measured. Default false

proxy.role_aggressiveness.description: Opt-in per-role prose compression for the proxy's frozen request region (#710). Assistant turns are always passed through verbatim

system.description: Opt-in prose compression intensity (0.0ΓÇô1.0) for system prompts in the proxy's frozen request region. Unset = leave untouched. Higher = more aggressive. Cache-safe (deterministic, never touches the client-cached prefix)

user.description: Opt-in prose compression intensity (0.0ΓÇô1.0) for free-text user turns (never tool results) in the proxy's frozen request region. Unset = leave untouched

allow_auto_reroot.description: Allow automatic project-root re-rooting when absolute paths outside the jail are seen

allow_ide_config_dirs.description: Allow jailed ctx_* tools to read home-level IDE config dirs (registry-derived; covers all editors). Off by default ΓÇö exposes other agents' sessions/credentials

auto_capture.description: Automatic knowledge capture from tool findings

auto_mode_learning.description: Opt-in: let adaptive learning signals (predictor, bandit, heatmap, adaptive policy, bounce/path memory) influence `auto` mode. Off by default for a deterministic, I/O-light cascade (capability guards + size/task heuristic only) that keeps output byte-stable for prompt caching. Override via LEAN_CTX_AUTO_MODE_LEARNING

bm25_max_cache_mb.description: Maximum BM25 cache file size in MB

buddy_enabled.description: Enable the buddy system for multi-agent coordination

bypass_hints.description: Bypass-hint mode: when agents use native Read/Grep instead of lean-ctx tools, a hint is appended to the next tool response. on (default), off, aggressive (hint on every call, no cooldown). Override via LEAN_CTX_BYPASS_HINTS

cache_max_tokens.description: Token budget for the in-memory ctx_read cache (0 = built-in default 500k). When exceeded, least-valuable entries are evicted immediately via RRF (recency x frequency x size) so reads never block; eviction is not deferred to the staleness TTL

cache_policy.description: Cache policy for ctx_read: aggressive (13-tok stubs), safe (map on hit), off (always disk)

compression_aggressiveness.description: Global compression intensity 0.0 (lossless) ΓÇô 1.0 (max), mapped onto read modes/entropy/IB. Empty = per-mode defaults

compression_level.description: Unified output-style level for the model's prose (not tool-output compression). lite=plain concise (default), standard/max=denser symbolic 'power modes'

content_defined_chunking.description: Enable Rabin-Karp chunking for cache-optimal output ordering

crush_verbatim_json.description: Opt-in: losslessly crush array-heavy JSON from verbatim data commands (gh api, jq, kubectl get -o json, curl). Off by default keeps them verbatim. Reshapes only when it at least halves the payload; fully reconstructible

custom_aliases.description: Custom command aliases (array of {command, alias} entries)

debug_log.description: Opt-in (default off): write a human-readable debug log of intercepted MCP tool calls and hook routing decisions (lean-ctx vs native, with the reason) to <state_dir>/logs/debug.log. View with `lean-ctx debug-log`

default_tool_categories.description: Tool categories active by default (core, arch, debug, memory, metrics, session). Override via LCTX_DEFAULT_CATEGORIES

delta_explicit.description: Serve explicit full/lines re-reads of changed cached files as diffs (opt-in). Override via LCTX_DELTA_EXPLICIT=1

disabled_tools.description: Tools to exclude from the MCP tool list

enable_wakeup_ctx.description: Append wakeup briefing (facts, session summary) to ctx_overview output. Set false to reduce context bloat when calling ctx_overview frequently.

excluded_commands.description: Commands to exclude from shell hook interception

extra_ignore_patterns.description: Extra glob patterns to ignore in graph/overview/preload

extra_roots.description: Extra project roots for multi-root workspaces (auto-added to PathJail allow-list)

graph_index_max_files.description: Maximum files in graph index. 0 = unlimited (default). Set >0 to cap for constrained systems

max_disk_mb.description: Simplified disk budget in MB (0 = disabled). Distributes: archive ~25%, BM25 ~10%

max_index_threads.description: Cap rayon threads for the CPU-heavy index build (0 = all cores). Bounds per-instance CPU so concurrent sessions don't saturate the host on startup

max_ram_percent.description: Maximum percentage of system RAM that lean-ctx may use (1-50, default 5)

max_staleness_days.description: Auto-purge data older than N days (0 = disabled). Flows into archive.max_age_hours

memory_cleanup.description: Controls how aggressively memory is freed when idle

memory_profile.description: Controls RAM vs feature trade-off (performance = max quality)

minimal_overhead.description: Skip session/knowledge/gotcha blocks in MCP instructions

no_degrade.description: Disable all automatic read-mode degradation. Override via LCTX_NO_DEGRADE=1

output_density.description: Controls how dense/compact MCP tool output is formatted

passthrough_urls.description: URLs to pass through without proxy interception

path_jail.description: Filesystem path jail. null/true = enforced (tools confined to the project root + allow_paths). false = the blanket "any path" opt-out ΓÇö every tool path is allowed (for containers/sandboxes where the boundary is external). Compression and secret redaction are unaffected. Flip both planes at once with `lean-ctx yolo` / `lean-ctx secure`

permission_inheritance.description: Mirror the host IDE's permission rules onto lean-ctx tools (v1: OpenCode). When on, ctx_shell honors your bash/rm * rules instead of bypassing them. Override via LEAN_CTX_PERMISSION_INHERITANCE

persona.description: Active context persona (persona-spec-v1): selects the domain bundle ΓÇö tool surface, read-mode/compressor/chunker defaults, intent taxonomy, sensitivity floor. Built-ins: coding (default), research, lead-gen, support, data-analysis; or a custom <name>.toml from the personas dir. Override via LEAN_CTX_PERSONA

prefer_native_editor.description: Disable lean-ctx edit tools (ctx_edit) so the host's native editor handles edits (#454)

preserve_compact_formats.description: Already-compact output formats preserved verbatim instead of recompressed (e.g. ["toon"]). Set to [] to disable

profile.description: Persistent profile name. Checked after LEAN_CTX_PROFILE env var. Set via: lean-ctx config set profile passthrough

project_root.description: Explicit project root directory. Prevents accidental home-directory scans

proxy_enabled.description: Enable/disable the proxy layer. null = auto-detect, true = force on, false = force off

proxy_port.description: Custom proxy port (default: 4444). Useful for multi-user systems. Env: LEAN_CTX_PROXY_PORT

proxy_require_token.description: Require lean-ctx Bearer token authentication and disable provider API key fallback

proxy_timeout_ms.description: Proxy reachability timeout in ms (default: 200). Override via LEAN_CTX_PROXY_TIMEOUT_MS

read_only_roots.description: Read-only sibling roots: reads allowed, writes always denied (edit/refactor/export)

redirect_exclude.description: URL patterns to exclude from proxy redirection

reference_results.description: Store large tool outputs as references instead of inline content

response_verbosity.description: Controls how verbose tool responses are

rules_injection.description: How rules load for CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md agents: shared block, dedicated (no shared-file edits; SessionStart hook / instructions[] / context.fileName), or off (write no rules file ΓÇö for hosts that supply their own steering or phase-isolated/non-caching harnesses). Override via LEAN_CTX_RULES_INJECTION

rules_scope.description: Where agent rule files are installed. Override via LEAN_CTX_RULES_SCOPE

savings_footer.description: Controls visibility of token savings footers: always (default, show on every response), never, auto (context-dependent). Also: LEAN_CTX_SHOW_SAVINGS=1|0

shadow_mode.description: Opt-in (default off): transparently route native Read/Grep/Edit/Shell through lean-ctx ΓÇö via hooks for hook-based agents, via the interception plugin for OpenCode

shell_activation.description: Controls when the shell hook auto-activates aliases

shell_allow_writes.description: Allow ctx_shell file-write redirects (>, >>, tee, heredoc-to-file, curl -o, wget default mode). Default false ΓÇö prefer the native Write/Edit tool. The real command gating (allowlist, dangerous-pattern, interpreter-eval) still applies

shell_allowlist.description: Optional shell command allowlist. When non-empty, only listed binaries are permitted

shell_allowlist_extra.description: Commands merged on top of shell_allowlist without replacing the defaults. Managed via `lean-ctx allow <cmd>`

shell_heavy_timeout_secs.description: Shell command timeout (seconds) for heavy commands (cargo build/test, make, docker build, git commit/push). null = built-in 10-minute ceiling

shell_security.description: Shell command gating: enforce (default, secure), warn (log only, never block) or off (skip allowlist + hard blocks; compression stays active)

shell_strict_mode.description: Block $(), backticks, <() in shell arguments. Default false = warn only.

shell_timeout_secs.description: Shell command timeout (seconds) for normal commands. null = built-in 2-minute default. LEAN_CTX_SHELL_TIMEOUT_MS overrides both tiers (in ms)

slow_command_threshold_ms.description: Commands taking longer than this (ms) are recorded in the slow log. Set to 0 to disable

structure_first.description: Opt-in: bias `auto` toward structure-first reads (map) for medium code files on a cold read. Off by default ΓÇö for phase-isolated harnesses with no warm-session cache payback. Override via LEAN_CTX_STRUCTURE_FIRST

symbol_map_auto.description: Opt-in: ╬▒-code identifier substitution in aggressive reads (>50-file projects). Off by default ΓÇö abbreviated symbols hinder editing/refactoring

team_auto_push.description: Opt-in: daemon periodically pushes your signed savings batch to team_url (off by default; requires team_url + team_token)

team_token.description: Bearer token for the team server (push needs a member token; pull/auto-push needs the configured team token)

team_url.description: Team server base URL for the opt-in savings roll-up (push/pull)

tee_mode.description: Controls when shell output is tee'd to disk for later retrieval

terse_agent.description: Controls agent output verbosity via instructions injection

tool_profile.description: Tool visibility profile: minimal (6 tools), standard (17), power (all). Override via LEAN_CTX_TOOL_PROFILE

tools_enabled.description: Explicit list of enabled tool names (overrides tool_profile when non-empty)

ultra_compact.description: Legacy flag for maximum compression (use compression_level instead)

search.description: Hybrid search weights for ctx_semantic_search (BM25 + dense vector + SPLADE + graph proximity)

bm25_candidates.description: Number of BM25 candidates to retrieve before fusion

bm25_weight.description: BM25 lexical search weight in RRF fusion

dense_candidates.description: Number of dense candidates to retrieve before fusion

dense_enabled.description: Enable the dense (embedding) retrieval path. false ΓåÆ hybrid search ranks with BM25 + graph + rerank (+ SPLADE) only, skipping the embedding engine and the persistent embeddings.json (lighter footprint, no embed latency). An explicit mode=dense query still forces dense.

dense_weight.description: Dense vector search weight in RRF fusion

custom_patterns.description: Additional regex patterns to detect as secrets

enabled.description: Enable secret/credential detection in tool outputs

sensitivity.description: Per-item sensitivity model with a uniform policy floor (#212)

action.description: How to enforce the floor: redact (mask spans) or drop (withhold item)

enabled.description: Enable the per-item sensitivity policy floor (no-op when false)

policy_floor.description: Block items at/above this level: public|internal|confidential|secret

setup.description: Controls what lean-ctx injects during setup and updates. Fresh installs default to non-invasive (rules/skills off, MCP on).

auto_inject_rules.description: Inject agent rule files during setup/update. null=auto (inject if already present), true=always, false=never

auto_inject_skills.description: Install SKILL.md files during setup/update. null=auto (install if rules present), true=always, false=never

auto_update_mcp.description: Register lean-ctx MCP server in editor configs during setup/update

skillify.description: Skillify miner: distill recurring session diary + knowledge patterns into rules

enabled.description: Master switch for the skillify miner (codify recurring session patterns into .cursor/rules). Only acts when explicitly invoked.

min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence for a single curated knowledge fact to be codified without repetition (0.0..=1.0).

min_recurrence.description: Minimum reinforcements (confirmations / repeated mentions) before a sub-threshold-confidence pattern is codified.

scope.description: Where generated rules are written: project (<repo>/.cursor/rules, git-committable) or global (~/.cursor/rules).

summaries.description: AI session summaries: periodic, semantically-recallable session digests

enabled.description: Record periodic, semantically-recallable AI session summaries (what was done, files, decisions).

every_n_turns.description: Tool calls between automatic session summaries (gated by the auto-checkpoint cadence).

max_kept.description: Maximum session summaries kept per project (oldest pruned first).

check_interval_hours.description: How often to check for updates (hours)

notify_only.description: Only notify about updates, don't install automatically
